recommendations.title: The Pick-up Artist
recommendations.overview: A womanizer meets his match when he falls for the daughter of a gambling addict who is in debt to the mob.

recommendations.title: Keanu
recommendations.overview: Friends hatch a plot to retrieve a stolen cat by posing as drug dealers for a street gang.

recommendations.title: Blood and Bone
recommendations.overview: In Los Angeles, an ex-con takes the underground fighting world by storm in his quest to fulfill a promise to a dead friend.

recommendations.title: Next Friday
recommendations.overview: A streetwise man flees South Central Los Angeles heading to the suburbs and his lottery-winner uncle and cousin to avoid a neighborhood thug with a grudge who has just escaped from prison. But trouble soon follows and the suburbs will never be the sa

recommendations.title: Bloody Hell
recommendations.overview: A man with a mysterious past flees the country to escape his own personal hell... only to arrive somewhere much worse. In an effort to survive this new horror, he turns to his personified conscience.

recommendations.title: The Killing of a Chinese Bookie
recommendations.overview: Cosmo Vittelli, the proprietor of a sleazy, low-rent Hollywood cabaret, has a real affection for the women who strip in his peepshows and the staff who keep up his dingy establishment. He also has a major gambling problem that has gotten him in troub

recommendations.title: Hobson's Choice
recommendations.overview: A widower refuses to let his three daughters marry in order to avoid paying settlements, so they'll just have to outsmart him.

recommendations.title: Volunteers
recommendations.overview: After graduating from Yale in 1962, womanizing Lawrence flees a gambling debt that his rich dad won't pay and takes his roomie's place as a Peace Corps Volunteer in the Thai Golden Triangle with two other PCVs. Will he survive two years?

recommendations.title: Sharper
recommendations.overview: A small, wealthy family in New York City gets progressively torn apart by secrets, lies, and the theft that orchestrates all of it.

recommendations.title: Pistol Whipped
recommendations.overview: Steven Seagal stars in this gritty, no-holds barred action film as an elite ex-cop with a gambling problem and a mountain of debt. When a mysterious man offers to clear his debts in exchange for the assassination of the city's most notorious gangster
